CustomField.formula:
IF( OR(TEXT( Status__c ) = "Specialist Accepted",TEXT( Status__c ) = "Completed"), IMAGE("/img/samples/color_green.gif", "green", 15, 15), IF( OR(TEXT( Status__c ) = "Specialist Accepted",TEXT( Status__c ) = "Canceled"), IMAGE("/img/samples/color_green.gif", "green", 15, 15), IF( OR(TEXT(Status__c) = "Draft"), IMAGE("/img/samples/color_red.gif", "red", 15, 15)&" Ensure the Request is Submitted For Approval", IMAGE("/img/samples/color_yellow.gif", "yellow", 15, 15)
) ) )
CustomField.label: Approval Status
